pg104-p2-s1: With few exceptions, our book thus far has spoken of men.
pg104-p2-s2: But what we have said applies quite as much to women.
pg104-p2-s3:
Our
activities in behalf of women who drink are on the increase.
pg104-p2-s4:
There is every evidence that women regain their health as
readily as men if they try our suggestions.
pg104-p2:
With few exceptions, our book thus far has spoken of men. But what we have said applies quite as much to women. Our
activities in behalf of women who drink are on the increase. There is every evidence that women regain their health as
readily as men if they try our suggestions.
pg104-p3-s1:
But for every man who drinks others are involved - the wife who trembles in fear of the next debauch; the mother and
father who see their son wasting away.
pg104-p3:
But for every man who drinks others are involved - the wife who trembles in fear of the next debauch; the mother and
father who see their son wasting away.
pg104-p4-s1:
Among us are wives, relatives and friends whose problem has been solved, as well as some who have not yet found a happy
solution.
pg104-p4-s2: We want the wives of Alcoholics Anonymous to address the wives of men who drink too much.
pg104-p4-s3:
What they say will
apply to nearly everyone bound by ties of blood or affection to an alcoholic.
pg104-p4:
Among us are wives, relatives and friends whose problem has been solved, as well as some who have not yet found a happy
solution. We want the wives of Alcoholics Anonymous to address the wives of men who drink too much. What they say will
apply to nearly everyone bound by ties of blood or affection to an alcoholic.
pg104-p5-s1: As wives of Alcoholics Anonymous, we would like you to feel that we understand as perhaps few can.
pg104-p5-s2:
We want to analyze
mistakes we have made.
pg104-p5-s3:
We want to leave you with the feeling that no situation is too difficult and no unhappiness too
great to be overcome.
pg104-p5:
As wives of Alcoholics Anonymous, we would like you to feel that we understand as perhaps few can. We want to analyze
mistakes we have made. We want to leave you with the feeling that no situation is too difficult and no unhappiness too
great to be overcome.
pg104-p6-s1: We have traveled a rocky road, there is no mistake about that.
pg104-p6-s2:
We have had long rendezvous with hurt pride, frustration,
self-pity, misunderstanding and fear.
pg104-p6:
